entry.title: 大家好，这是我的第一篇贴子！
entry.content: 欢迎使用 Hexo! 这是你的第一篇贴子. 访问 Hexo文档 可以获取更多信息. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My First Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment Code HighlightingPython code1234def post_with_token(api_path, json): global api_token if not api_token: fetch_api_token()
